name: corcept_hook_pretool_guard
title: Corcept Hook: PreToolUse Guard
description: Evaluate the PreToolUse guard against a candidate tool call. Authority: Plan (returns a gate decision without itself mutating the ledger; the matched posttool-audit row attests the actual decision downstream). Trust ceiling: Reviewed. Pass the hook event JSON in the hook_input argument.

hook_input.description: Claude Code hook event JSON (the payload the CLI would otherwise read from stdin). When omitted, the CLI falls back to reading stdin.
